desc: This eye-shaped artefact projects a malevolent glare

<Entity tags="hittable,teleportable_NOT,item_physics,item_pickup,evil_eye" >

	
	<ProjectileComponent
		_tags="enabled_in_world"
		lifetime="-1"
		damage="0"
		penetrate_entities="1"
		damage_scaled_by_speed="1"
		damage_scale_max_speed="200"
		never_hit_player="1"
		>
		<damage_by_type
			melee="0.5"
			>
		</damage_by_type>
	</ProjectileComponent>



	<!-- physical presence -->
	
	<PhysicsBodyComponent 
		_tags="enabled_in_world"
		uid="1" 
		allow_sleep="1" 
		angular_damping="0.95" 
		linear_damping="0"
		fixed_rotation="0" 
		is_bullet="1" 
		auto_clean="0"
		on_death_leave_physics_body="1"
		hax_fix_going_through_ground="1"
		>
	</PhysicsBodyComponent>
	
	<PhysicsImageShapeComponent 
		body_id="1"
		centered="1"
		is_circle="0"
		image_file="data/items_gfx/evil_eye.png"
		material="item_box2d_meat"
		>
	</PhysicsImageShapeComponent>
	
	<PhysicsThrowableComponent
		max_throw_speed="180"
		throw_force_coeff="1.25"
		min_torque="0.1"
		max_torque="1"
		>
	</PhysicsThrowableComponent>

	<!-- 27.7.2023 -->
	<PhysicsKeepInWorldComponent
		check_whole_aabb="1"
		predict_aabb="1" >
	</PhysicsKeepInWorldComponent>

	<VelocityComponent
		_tags="enabled_in_world"
		>
	</VelocityComponent>

	<!-- plasma functionality -->
	<Entity>
		<LaserEmitterComponent
			_enabled="0">
			<laser
				is_emitting="0"
				damage_to_entities="0.06"
				damage_to_cells="2500"
				max_length="54"
				beam_radius="2.5"
				max_cell_durability_to_destroy="11"
				root_entity_is_responsible_for_damage="1"
				audio_enabled="0"
				audio_hit_always_enabled="1"
				hit_particle_chance="40"
				beam_particle_chance="80"
				beam_particle_type="spark_red_bright"
				>
			</laser>
		</LaserEmitterComponent>
		<SpriteComponent
			_enabled="0"
			_tags="enabled_in_world,enabled_in_hand"
			image_file="data/projectiles_gfx/orb_red.xml"
			alpha="0.7"
			additive="1"
			emissive="1"
			>
		</SpriteComponent>
	</Entity>
	<Entity>
		<InheritTransformComponent></InheritTransformComponent>
		<!-- temporary sprite. removed when laser is turned on for the 1st time -->
		<SpriteComponent
			_tags="enabled_in_world,enabled_in_hand"
			image_file="data/items_gfx/evil_eye_iris.png"
			z_index="-1.6"
			offset_x="4"
			offset_y="4"
			>
		</SpriteComponent>
	</Entity>
	
	<LuaComponent
		_tags="enabled_in_hand"
		_enabled="0"
		script_source_file="data/scripts/items/evil_eye_beam.lua"
		execute_every_n_frame="1"
		>
	</LuaComponent>
	
	<LuaComponent 
		_tags="enabled_in_hand"
		script_enabled_changed="data/scripts/items/evil_eye_state.lua"
		execute_every_n_frame="-1"
		>
	</LuaComponent>
	
	<!-- item -->

	<SpriteComponent
		_tags="enabled_in_hand,evil_eye_in_hand"
		_enabled="0"
		offset_x="5.5"
		offset_y="5.5"
		image_file="data/items_gfx/evil_eye.png"
		>
	</SpriteComponent>

	<ItemComponent
		_tags="enabled_in_world"
		item_name="$item_evil_eye"
		max_child_items="0"
		is_pickable="1"
		is_equipable_forced="1"
		ui_sprite="data/ui_gfx/items/evil_eye.png"
		ui_description="$item_description_evil_eye"
		preferred_inventory="QUICK"
		>
	</ItemComponent>

	<UIInfoComponent
		_tags="enabled_in_world"
		name="$item_evil_eye">
	</UIInfoComponent>
	
	<SpriteParticleEmitterComponent
		sprite_file="data/particles/ray.xml" 
		delay="0"
		lifetime="1.5"
		color.r="1" color.g="0.5" color.b="1" color.a="1.0"
		color_change.r="0" color_change.g="0" color_change.b="0" color_change.a="-3.5"
		velocity.x="0" velocity.y="0"
		gravity.x="0" gravity.y="0"
		velocity_slowdown="0"
		rotation="0"
		angular_velocity="0"
		scale.x="1" scale.y="0"
		scale_velocity.x="-0.3" scale_velocity.y="3"
		emission_interval_min_frames="3"
		emission_interval_max_frames="6"
		emissive="1"
		additive="1"
		count_min="1" count_max="1"
		use_velocity_as_rotation="1"
		randomize_position.min_x="-2"
		randomize_position.max_x="2"
		randomize_position.min_y="-2"
		randomize_position.max_y="2"
		randomize_velocity.min_x="-30"
		randomize_velocity.max_x="30"
		randomize_velocity.min_y="-30"
		randomize_velocity.max_y="30"
		velocity_always_away_from_center="1">
	</SpriteParticleEmitterComponent>
	
	<AbilityComponent
		ui_name="$item_evil_eye"
		throw_as_item="1"
		>
		<gun_config
			deck_capacity="0">
		</gun_config>
	</AbilityComponent>

	<!-- FX -->

	<LightComponent
		_tags="enabled_in_world,enabled_in_hand,magic_eye_check"
		radius="60"
		r="255"
		g="94"
		b="94"
		>
	</LightComponent>
	
	<ParticleEmitterComponent 
		_tags="enabled_in_world,enabled_in_hand"
		emitted_material_name="spark_red"
		offset.x="0"
		offset.y="0"
		x_pos_offset_min="-5"
		x_pos_offset_max="5"
		y_pos_offset_min="-5"
		y_pos_offset_max="5"
		x_vel_min="-60"
		x_vel_max="60"
		y_vel_min="-60"
		y_vel_max="60"
		velocity_always_away_from_center="1"

		friction="1"
		count_min="8"
		count_max="20"
		lifetime_min="0.3"
		lifetime_max="0.9"
		emit_real_particles="0"
		render_on_grid="1"
		emit_cosmetic_particles="1"
		fade_based_on_lifetime="0"
		emission_interval_min_frames="10"
		emission_interval_max_frames="100"
		is_emitting="1" >
	</ParticleEmitterComponent>


</Entity>
